ee:transform.doc:name: prepare covid case payload ready for db

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { source: payload.source, case_type: payload.caseType, first_name: payload.firstName, last_name: payload.lastName,
phone: (payload.phone replace /[^0-9]/ with "") as Number, email: payload.email,
date_of_birth: (payload.dateOfBirth as Date {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}),
national_id: payload.nationalID, national_id_type: payload.nationalIDType,
street_address: payload.address.streetAddress, city: payload.address.city, state: payload.address.state, postal: payload.address.postal as Number, country: payload.address.country,
create_date: now(), update_date: now(), create_by: "UHIS", update_by: "UHIS" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { national_id: payload.nationalID, street_address: payload.address.streetAddress, country: payload.address.country, city: payload.address.city,
date_of_birth: payload.dateOfBirth as Date, // ✅ Date object
case_type: payload.caseType, last_name: payload.lastName, source: payload.source, national_id_type: payload.nationalIDType,
update_date: now(), // ✅ Timestamp create_date: now(), // ✅ Timestamp
create_by: "UHIS", phone: payload.phone, state: payload.address.state, postal: payload.address.postal, update_by: "UHIS", first_name: payload.firstName, email: payload.email }
